About Organization

The Uttar Pradesh Basic Education department is responsible for providing education to the citizens of Uttar Pradesh, India.

As per official notification, the department has released a recruitment notification for ECCE Educators in Amethi district.

About the Programme

The ECCE Educator Recruitment programme is a government job opportunity in India, aimed at recruiting eligible candidates for the position of ECCE Educators in Amethi district.

The programme is designed to provide education to the children of Amethi district, and the selected candidates will be responsible for teaching and mentoring them.
